latest.title: Horses remember familiar faces for months
latest.script_key: horses can remember familiar faces watch the eyes and ears because horses can learn who is familiar and who feels safe that memory changes how calmly they approach people and other horses the look is part recognition part decision which herd animal next

latest.title: Dogs don't need raincoats why they wear them
latest.script_key: dogs coats keep them dry that s why we dress them in raincoats but here s the thing those coats are already waterproof the real reason we re cold our dogs shake they tilt their heads all because we freak out when they shiver i d do the same for my kid

latest.title: Fishing boats that restore the ocean
latest.script_key: boats that fix the ocean watch this one twice the nets aren t just fishing they re reseeding coral that s why the coral here grows back faster than anywhere else ever seen a boat plant an underwater garden didn t think so

latest.title: Mountains don't just sit still for winter
latest.script_key: these peaks change right now see the snow creeping down the slopes that s not just snow it s the mountain wearing itself down the glaciers are grinding rock into dust faster than you think because every time ice moves it scrapes the mountain thinner shaping the valleys we see

latest.title: The moon keeps one face turned toward Earth
